get.summary: Get all users that have role as user

post.summary: Send a message to Gemini AI
post.description: Authenticated user sends a message, receives AI response.

500.description: Internal server error (e.g., AI service failure)

get.summary: Get all chat history for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns an array of chat documents (each containing conversation messages) belonging to the user.

delete.summary: Delete all chat history for the authenticated user
delete.description: Removes every chat document associated with the user (full conversation history).

get.description: Retrieves a list of all events (public).

post.description: Creates an event with an optional image upload. Requires admin JWT token.

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid admin token

get.description: Returns events with a date later than current time.
Returns events with a date earlier than current time.
Returns events between startDate and endDate (query parameters).
Returns events that match the given location string (case‑sensitive ?).
Returns remaining capacity and number of booked tickets (if capacity is set).
Returns a list of all food items. Requires JWT authentication.

post.summary: Create a new food item (Admin only)
post.description: Creates a food item with an optional image upload. Requires both JWT (admin) authentication.

get.description: Returns foods where `featured` is true. Requires JWT authentication.
Returns foods belonging to a specific category. Requires JWT authentication.
Returns all food items linked to a specific attraction. Requires JWT authentication.

get.summary: Get a single food item by ID
